mapper.update: /* 토론방 댓글 삭제 ForumCmntDAO.deleteCmnt */ UPDATE TB_LMS_DSCS_CMNT SET DELYN = 'Y' , MOD_DTTM = FN_DTTM() WHERE DSCS_CMNT_ID = #{cmntSn}
mapper.select: /* 토론 댓글 목록 ForumCmntDAO.cmntList */ WITH OPNN ( RN, DSCS_CMNT_ID, DSCS_ID, ATCL_ID, UP_CMNT_ID, ATCL_CMNT_CTS, CMNT_CTS_LEN, EMTICN_NO, RGTRNM, RGTR_ID, FRST_INQ_DTTM, MDFR_ID, MOD_DTTM, DELYN, RSPNS_REQYN, STD_ID, CHILD_YN, LVL, PATH ) AS ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY A.FRST_INQ_DTTM DESC) AS RN , A.DSCS_CMNT_ID , A.DSCS_ID , A.ATCL_ID , A.UP_CMNT_ID , A.ATCL_CMNT_CTS , A.CMNT_CTS_LEN , A.EMTICN_NO , A.RGTRNM , A.RGTR_ID , A.FRST_INQ_DTTM , A.MDFR_ID , A.MOD_DTTM , A.DELYN , A.RSPNS_REQYN , A.STD_ID , CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_CMNT WHERE UP_CMNT_ID = A.DSCS_CMNT_ID AND DELYN = 'N' ) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS CHILD_YN , 1 AS LVL , TO_CHAR(A.DSCS_CMNT_ID) AS PATH FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_CMNT A WHERE A.UP_CMNT_ID IS NULL AND A.DSCS_ID = #{forumCd} AND A.ATCL_ID = #{atclSn} UNION ALL SELECT B.RN , A.DSCS_CMNT_ID , A.DSCS_ID , A.ATCL_ID , A.UP_CMNT_ID , A.ATCL_CMNT_CTS , A.CMNT_CTS_LEN , A.EMTICN_NO , A.RGTRNM , A.RGTR_ID , A.FRST_INQ_DTTM , A.MDFR_ID , A.MOD_DTTM , A.DELYN , A.RSPNS_REQYN , A.STD_ID , CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_CMNT WHERE UP_CMNT_ID = A.DSCS_CMNT_ID AND DELYN = 'N' ) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS CHILD_YN , B.LVL + 1 AS LVL , B.PATH || '-' || TO_CHAR(A.DSCS_CMNT_ID) AS PATH FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_CMNT A JOIN OPNN B ON A.UP_CMNT_ID = B.DSCS_CMNT_ID WHERE A.DSCS_ID = #{forumCd} AND A.ATCL_ID = #{atclSn} ) SELECT A.DSCS_CMNT_ID , A.DSCS_ID , A.ATCL_ID , A.UP_CMNT_ID , (SELECT RGTRNM FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_CMNT WHERE DSCS_CMNT_ID = A.UP_CMNT_ID) AS PAR_REG_NM , A.ATCL_CMNT_CTS , A.CMNT_CTS_LEN , A.EMTICN_NO , (SELECT USERNM FROM TB_LMS_USR WHERE USER_ID = A.RGTR_ID) AS RGTRNM , A.RGTR_ID , A.FRST_INQ_DTTM , A.MDFR_ID , A.MOD_DTTM , A.DELYN , A.RSPNS_REQYN , A.STD_ID , A.LVL , A.PATH , (SELECT PHT_FILE FROM TB_LMS_USR WHERE USER_ID = A.RGTR_ID) AS PHT_FILE_PATH FROM OPNN A JOIN ( SELECT RN, MAX(CASE WHEN CHILD_YN = 'N' THEN LVL ELSE 0 END) AS MAX_LVL FROM OPNN GROUP BY RN ) B ON A.RN = B.RN WHERE A.LVL <= B.MAX_LVL AND (A.DELYN = 'N' OR A.CHILD_YN = 'Y') ORDER BY A.RN, A.PATH

/* 토론 댓글 조회 ForumCmntDAO.forumCmntSelect */ SELECT DSCS_CMNT_ID , DSCS_ID , ATCL_ID , UP_CMNT_ID , ATCL_CMNT_CTS , EMTICN_NO , STD_ID , DELYN , RSPNS_REQYN , CMNT_CTS_LEN FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_CMNT WHERE DSCS_CMNT_ID = #{cmntSn}
